title: Concrete Things
description: Adds a concrete blocks such as stairs and slabs
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9fa61fd4081a8beb3f3bdafe2e0b54385d47088.webp)
- ## New Blocks:
  - Concrete Slabs
  - Concrete Stairs

- ## Features:
  - Support all concrete colors
  - Custom crafting recipes to every slab or stairs in the mod

> Report a bug in [https://discord.gg/creativty-studio](https://discord.gg/NyhU8Et4gW) and we will reply as soon we can
